candidate_check.description: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS must have system commands set to a mode of 0755 or less permissive.

fix_text_excerpt:
Configure the system commands to be protected from unauthorized access. Run the following command: 
 
$ sudo find /bin /sbin /usr/bin /usr/sbin /usr/local/bin /usr/local/sbin -perm /022 -type f -exec chmod 755 '{}' \;
title: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS must have system commands set to a mode of 0755 or less permissive.
